description:
Patrol 2 complete. Extraordinary action: mailed Mayor with specific Dolt diagnosis.

ROOT CAUSE FOUND: PID 72535 — theoutlived rig-level Dolt orphan at /Users/jeremy/gt/theoutlived/.beads/dolt — holding port 3307 and blocking town-level Dolt from starting. PPID=1 (parent died).

BLOCKER: th-witness session active (node). Cannot kill PID 72535 without risking disruption. Mailed Mayor to coordinate.

RIG STATUS: All 5 polecats (dust/nitro/rust/shiny/thunder) idle/stopped. Refinery stopped. beads_mm workaround functional — bd commands working.

NEXT: Await Mayor response on Dolt fix. Routine patrol otherwise.
title: 🤝 HANDOFF: Witness patrol - Dolt diagnosis update

description:
Completed 1 patrol with extraordinary action.

DOLT STATUS: Town-level Dolt at .dolt-data/ cannot hold port 3307 — competing rig-level Dolt servers auto-spawn from agent bd commands (theoutlived, myndy_api .beads/dolt/ dirs). Mailed Mayor with CRITICAL diagnosis.

WORKAROUND APPLIED: Ran bd init --force to create beads_mm on the rogue server. bd commands work but database is fresh (historical issues lost until town-level Dolt restored). Renamed .dolt-data/mm to .dolt-data/beads_mm with reverse symlink for when town-level Dolt resumes.

RIG STATUS: All 5 polecats (dust/nitro/rust/shiny/thunder) idle/stopped. Refinery stopped. 2 open E2E beads (mm-4hs, mm-5rl) awaiting human DNS/SendGrid config (from previous handoff - may be in old db).

NEXT: await Mayor response on Dolt fix. Routine patrol.
